findings.title: wasp-lang/wasp
findings.description: The batteries-included full-stack framework for the AI era. Develop JS/TS web apps (React, Node.js, and Prisma) using declarative code that abstracts away complex full-stack features like auth, background jobs, RPC, email sending, end-to-end type safety, single-command deployment, and more.

findings.title: Mail-0/Zero
findings.description: Experience email the way you want with Mail0 – the first open source email app that puts your privacy and safety first. Join the discord: https://mail0.link/discord

findings.title: superagent-ai/superagent
findings.description: Superagent protects your AI applications against prompt injections, data leaks, and harmful outputs. Embed safety directly into your app and prove compliance to your customers.

findings.title: katanemo/plano
findings.description: Plano is an AI-native proxy and data plane for agentic apps — with built-in orchestration, safety, observability, and smart LLM routing so you stay focused on your agents core logic.

findings.title: sunnypilot/sunnypilot
findings.description: sunnypilot is an open source driver assistance system. sunnypilot offers the user a unique driving experience for over 350 supported car makes and models with modified behaviors of driving assist engagements. sunnypilot complies with the safety policy from comma.ai's openpilot as accurately as possible.

findings.title: Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
findings.description: Bootstraps a fresh Ubuntu VPS into a complete multi-agent AI development environment in 30 minutes: coding agents, session management, safety tools, and coordination infrastructure

findings.title: yueliu1999/Awesome-Jailbreak-on-LLMs
findings.description: Awesome-Jailbreak-on-LLMs is a collection of state-of-the-art, novel, exciting jailbreak methods on LLMs. It contains papers, codes, datasets, evaluations, and analyses.

findings.title: poco-ai/poco-claw
findings.description: A more beautiful and easier-to-use alternative to OpenClaw. It features a nicer Web UI, built-in IM support, and a sandboxed runtime for improved safety. Under the hood, it is powered by a Claude Code–based agent.

findings.title: nextlevelbuilder/goclaw
findings.description: GoClaw - GoClaw is OpenClaw rebuilt in Go — with multi-tenant isolation, 5-layer security, and native concurrency. Deploy AI agent teams at scale without compromising on safety.

findings.title: kaplanelad/shellfirm
findings.description: Safety guardrails for ai coding agents and human terminal commands

findings.title: google-deepmind/ai-safety-gridworlds
findings.description: This is a suite of reinforcement learning environments illustrating various safety properties of intelligent agents.

findings.title: 00quebec/Synthid-Bypass
findings.description: Ai safety research showing a working bypass to Google's synthid on Nano Banana Pro

findings.title: theNetworkChuck/dark-web-scraping-guide
findings.description: Comprehensive guide for NetworkChuck Episode 480 - Robin AI Dark Web Scraping Tool. Installation, usage, safety guidelines, and troubleshooting for educational security research.

findings.title: AI45Lab/AgentDoG
findings.description: A Diagnostic Guardrail Framework for AI Agent Safety and Security

findings.title: tigerlab-ai/tiger
findings.description: Open Source LLM toolkit to build trustworthy LLM applications. TigerArmor (AI safety), TigerRAG (embedding, RAG), TigerTune (fine-tuning)

findings.title: 0din-ai/ai-scanner
findings.description: AI model safety scanner built on NVIDIA garak

findings.title: devchilll/scope
findings.description: Configurable Multi-layered AI Agentic Safety Framework

findings.title: BlueFalconHD/apple_generative_model_safety_decrypted
findings.description: Decrypted Generative Model safety files for Apple Intelligence containing filters

findings.title: Infosys/Infosys-Responsible-AI-Toolkit
findings.description: The Infosys Responsible AI toolkit incorporates various features including safety, security, explainability, fairness, bias and hallucination detection to ensure AI solutions are trustworthy and transparent.

findings.title: caiovicentino/polymarket-mcp-server
findings.description: 🤖 AI-Powered MCP Server for Polymarket - Enable Claude to trade prediction markets with 45 tools, real-time monitoring, and enterprise-grade safety features
